scenarios.title: Protein Structure Prediction and Design Workflows
scenarios.when_to_read: AlphaFold, ColabFold, Boltz, Chai-1, ESM, ProteinMPNN, RFdiffusion, MSA generation, structure prediction outputs, protein backbone generation, binder design, and sequence design.
scenarios.role: Use ColabFold for protein structure prediction workflows: validate FASTA/CSV/A3M inputs, generate MSAs, plan batch predictions, inspect outputs, and troubleshoot optional AlphaFold, MMseqs2, JAX, GPU, and OpenMM dependencies.
scenarios.read_when: The request names `colabfold` or asks for package-specific APIs, CLIs, configs, data/model artifacts, error messages, workflows, or repository maintenance that match this project.
scenarios.best_for: batch prediction, inputs and formats, msa search, and relaxation and outputs.
scenarios.avoid_when: another repo skill in this scenario matches the user's task, package, model family, data format, serving backend, or workflow more directly.
scenarios.selection_guidance: Choose `colabfold` when the request names `colabfold`, centers on protein structure prediction workflows: validate FASTA/CSV/A3M inputs, generate MSAs, plan batch predictions, inspect outputs, and troubleshoot optional AlphaFold, MMseqs2, JAX, GPU, and OpenMM dependencies, uses its APIs or CLIs, references its configs/artifacts/errors, or asks for repository workflows in protein structure prediction and design workflows. Then route to batch prediction, inputs and formats, msa search, or relaxation and outputs when those focused workflows match.
